payload:
# CravingsPH UI Audit Resolution — Production Readiness

## Objective

Resolve all 18 issues from the initial UI audit (`issues/init/`) to make CravingsPH production-ready. Replace all stub data and local stores with real Supabase-backed persistence, enforce portal separation, add file upload infrastructure, implement QR scanning, and fix component-level bugs.

## Key Requirements

1. Follow the design and plan in `specs/ui-audit-resolution/`.
2. Apply schema changes with `pnpm db:push` (Drizz... [truncated, 5985 chars total]
Step 1 complete: 8 new schemas + 2 column additions, db:push applied, commit 044eb22
Step 2 complete: storage infrastructure — 5 buckets seeded, upload wrapper, StorageService with validation, commit 1b99162
Step 3 complete: portal separation — portalPreference on Session, owner layout guard, org.create guard, post-login routing, backward compat for null preference, commit 129cf11
Step 4 complete: discovery module — 4 public procedures (featured, nearby, search, locations), landing page SSR, search page tRPC hooks, dynamic location filter, commit 7649373
Step 5 complete: saved-restaurant module — 3 protected procedures (list, toggle, isSaved), frontend hook rewritten from localStorage to tRPC, card component simplified, commit bf5f0e5

Step 6 complete: order module — 11 protected procedures (create, listMine, getDetail, reorder, listByBranch, accept, reject, updateStatus, confirmPayment, rejectPayment, getTimeline), status machine with validated transitions, both frontend hooks rewritten from useSyncExternalStore to tRPC, zero component changes needed, commit cec75c1

Step 7 complete: review module — 2 procedures (create protected + listByRestaurant public), validates order ownership/completion/uniqueness, frontend hooks rewritten from stubs to tRPC useMutation+useQuery, zero component changes, commit 2a348d1

Step 8 complete: payment-config module — 6 protected procedures (list, add, update, remove, setDefault, has), org-scoped via findOrgIdByOwnerId, soft-delete with default promotion, frontend hook rewritten from useSyncExternalStore to tRPC, zero component changes, commit ec945b5

Step 9 complete: verification module — 5 protected procedures (getRestaurantStatus, uploadDocument, removeDocument, submit, isSubmitted), ownership via restaurant→org join, frontend hook rewritten from useSyncExternalStore to tRPC, document card uploads to Supabase Storage via browser client, verification page simplified (removed local draft/contact fields), commit f9e43b6
Step 11 complete: admin user suspension persisted via profile.is_suspended + admin.setUserActive mutation. Committed 20b4604.

Step 12 complete: onboarding wizard uses real tRPC queries for steps 4-6 (menu.hasContent, paymentConfig.has, verification.isSubmitted). CompletionStep shows partial vs full completion. Committed 9b50c0c.

Step 14 complete: breadcrumb hydration fix (BreadcrumbSeparator as sibling not child), add-item dialog auto-selects category + accepts empty imageUrl, image URL input replaced with file upload to Supabase Storage, defensive image fallbacks across all menu item components. Committed e91a05d.

Step 17 complete: 4 Cebu City restaurant seed fixtures (cebu-lechon-house, sugbo-mercado-grill, cafe-cebuano, pochero-de-cebu) with lat/lng coordinates and isFeatured flags. Refactored seed runner into reusable seedRestaurant function. Added db:seed:all script. Committed 9fc5dd8.

Step 13 complete: removed dead owner nav links (/organization/orders, /organization/team, /organization/settings), fixed Profile to /account/profile, removed dead dashboard quick links. Committed 140cef4.
Step 15 complete: QR scanner modal with html5-qrcode, parses cravings:// URLs and plain slugs, handles camera denied. Committed 2e2abc5.
Step 16 complete: discovery save-for-later heart button on restaurant cards, guest redirect to login, auth-guarded saved list query. Committed e95623d.

## Reason
consecutive_failures

## Status
Too many consecutive failures.

## Summary
- Iterations: 22
- Duration: 2h 24m 47s
- Exit code: 1
